generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with input current I_M and output torque τ_M for rotational energy transformation"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel transmitting torque τ_G between motor and gearbox"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox transforming torque τ_out for rotational energy transformation"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on motor providing position and velocity measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData, MotorVelocityData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind gearbox providing gearwheel position and velocity measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearwheelPositionData, GearwheelVelocityData
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslControllerSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller sensors providing position, velocity, acceleration, and motor current measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SystemPositionData, SystemVelocityData, AccelerationData, MotorCurrentData
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance MotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearwheelPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance GearwheelVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance SystemPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSINUMERIK840DslControllerSensors
]

instance SystemVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSINUMERIK840DslControllerSensors
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSINUMERIK840DslControllerSensors
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSINUMERIK840DslControllerSensors
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current data trace (I_M) with metadata for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTT, MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor position data trace (r_M) with metadata for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTT, MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredGearwheelPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearwheel position data trace (r_G) with metadata for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearwheelPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTT, MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredSystemPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured system position data trace (r_out) with metadata for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SystemPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTT, MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulatedMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor position data trace (r̂_M) with metadata for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulatedGearwheelPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearwheel position data trace (r̂_G) with metadata for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearwheelPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulatedSystemPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated system position data trace (r̂_out) with metadata for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SystemPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance BlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance InternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Stribeck friction model for joint friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Dahl friction model for joint friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink LuGre friction model for joint friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation models and data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousMultiPhysicsFrictionIdentification, MotionAccuracyEnhancement
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetManagementService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShells : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetManagementService
]

instance MQTT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousMultiPhysicsFrictionIdentification
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for machine control and sensor data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancement
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for unified friction data display"
    DTDFVocab:enables IntegratedFrictionDataVisualization
]

instance ContinuousMultiPhysicsFrictionIdentification : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossIdentification
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancement : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through friction model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmAdjustment
]

instance IntegratedFrictionDataVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of friction data in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDataVisualization
]

instance FrictionLossIdentification : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of friction losses in robot joints for improved control"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of control algorithms based on refined friction models to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionDataVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard visualization of friction data for real-time monitoring"
]

instance AssetManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Digital twin asset management through standardized interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetManagementInsight
]

instance AssetManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Standardized asset management and interoperability for digital twin components"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot for machining applications with maximum working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed 75°/s"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslControllerSensors
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization via MQTT for live data processing; continuous friction model updates during robot operation with no specified fixed intervals."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML structural model, Simulink simulation models, MQTT data streams, processing components for friction identification, and unified dashboard visualization; purpose-driven for friction analysis in the robot's first axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated) for real-time friction model refinement during robot operation, with no focus on design or manufacturing stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated vs. measured data to identify friction deviations; no explicit verification methods detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for Industry 4.0 standards; SysML for model-based systems engineering; Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller standards for CNC operations."
]
